categories.label: Scientific / reportable tracks
categories.description: Intentional scientific reruns or reportable output builders.

categories.label: Sensitivity / appendix tracks
categories.description: Supporting branches that are informative but not the main reportable path.

categories.label: Read-only packaging / help utilities
categories.description: Safe utilities that summarize or audit the current repo state without rerunning expensive science.

categories.label: Legacy prototype tracks
categories.description: Backward-compatible prototype workflows preserved for debugging and regression.

entries.label: Mindoro reportable core bundle
entries.description: Prep, official Phase 1/2, strict Phase 3B, broader public support, and Mindoro Phase 4.
entries.notes: Use only when an intentional scientific rerun of the main Mindoro reportable path is desired.

steps.description: Prep inputs, scoring grid, and shoreline artifacts
Official deterministic control and 50-member ensemble forecast

entries.label: Phase 1 regional production rerun
entries.description: Dedicated 2016-2022 historical/regional drifter rerun that stages the missing drogued-only non-overlapping 72 h registry and a candidate baseline artifact.
entries.notes: Scientific rerun only. This does not overwrite config/phase1_baseline_selection.yaml and does not auto-run phase1_audit or phase5_sync.

steps.description: Full 2016-2022 historical/regional Phase 1 production rerun with candidate-baseline staging only

entries.label: DWH Phase 3C reportable bundle
entries.description: External-case setup, scientific forcing readiness, deterministic transfer validation, ensemble comparison, and PyGNOME comparator.

steps.description: PyGNOME comparator against the DWH truth masks

entries.label: Mindoro appendix / sensitivity bundle
entries.description: Public appendix, extended public scoring, retention, initialization, source-history, PyGNOME comparison, threshold, and recipe sensitivity branches.
entries.notes: These tracks are informative and reportable as support material, but they are not the main-text scientific core.

steps.description: March 23 extended public branch stress test

entries.notes: Appendix-only. This does not replace or relabel the frozen strict March 6 official result.

entries.notes: Appendix-only. This does not replace the frozen strict March 6 official result or the final validation package.

entries.label: Phase 1 finalization audit

entries.notes: Does not rerun the expensive 2016-2022 production study.

entries.notes: Does not rerun the expensive official forecast path by default.

entries.label: Final validation package refresh

entries.notes: Reuses existing scientific outputs without recomputing scores.

entries.description: Read-only reproducibility, launcher, documentation, and package synchronization layer.
entries.notes: Builds final_reproducibility_package without overwriting scientific outputs.

entries.label: Trajectory gallery build
entries.description: Read-only static gallery of trajectories, overlays, comparison maps, and Mindoro Phase 4 shoreline/oil-type figures.
entries.notes: Builds output/trajectory_gallery from existing outputs only and does not rerun expensive scientific branches.

entries.label: Trajectory gallery panel polish
entries.description: Read-only polished panel-ready figure pack with captions, locator insets, and comparison boards built from existing outputs only.

entries.label: Publication-grade figure package
entries.description: Read-only canonical presentation package with publication-grade single figures, comparison boards, captions, and talking points built from existing outputs only.
entries.notes: Builds output/figure_package_publication without rerunning expensive scientific branches.

entries.label: Prototype 2021 preferred debug bundle
entries.description: Preferred accepted-segment debug/demo path: prep, Phase 1/2, deterministic PyGNOME benchmark, and support-only similarity package.
entries.notes: Preferred debug/demo lane only. Built from the two accepted 2021 strict-gate drifter segments, uses the official four-recipe Phase 1 family, and stops at the transport-core bundle. Phase 3B and Phase 4 are separate and are not part of this proof path.

steps.description: Prototype 2021 cross-case PyGNOME similarity summary and forecast figure package

entries.label: Prototype 2016 legacy bundle
entries.description: Historical legacy-only prep, Phase 1/2, deterministic PyGNOME benchmark, similarity summary, and appendix/smoke follow-on steps.
entries.notes: Backward-compatible legacy debug/regression path only. Not the preferred debug lane and not the final Chapter 3 Phase 1 study. Prototype prep now attempts GFS too, but missing GFS remains best-effort and does not collapse the legacy bundle. The PyGNOME similarity step is transport-only, comparator-only, and now writes actual 24/48/72 h forecast singles plus one side-by-side board per case. Phases 3 and 3B remain legacy appendix/smoke checks here.

steps.description: Prototype cross-case PyGNOME similarity summary and forecast figure package

optional_future_work.label: Deeper artifact search and filtering inside the UI
